card.title: Getting started with Kazi
card.subtitle: Complete these steps to set up your organisation
card.allComplete: You're all set! Your organisation is ready to go.
card.dismissConfirm: Are you sure? This can't be undone.

create_project.label: Create your first project
create_project.description: Projects are where your team organises work, tracks time, and manages documents.

add_customer.label: Add a customer
add_customer.description: Customers represent the organisations you serve. Link them to projects for invoicing.

invite_member.label: Invite a team member
invite_member.description: Collaboration is better together. Invite colleagues to start working as a team.

log_time.label: Log time on a task
log_time.description: Time tracking powers invoicing, budgets, and profitability reports.

setup_rates.label: Set up your rate card
setup_rates.description: Define billing and cost rates to enable profitability tracking and accurate invoicing.

create_invoice.label: Generate your first invoice
create_invoice.description: Pull tracked time into a professional invoice. Send it to your client directly from Kazi.
